implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for ATM: A bank client can have two types of accounts

The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance
